market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape the city in style with this expansive apartment, boasting spectacular views of the Royal Armouries. As one of the most luxurious options in the area, this home sleeps up to 4 guests across its spacious rooms. Perfect for short breaks or corporate stays, this apartment is within easy reach of local transport links and attractions. Enjoy your stay in this tranquil oasis, while being just a stone's throw from the hustle and bustle of the city.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space: with none mentioned, guests expect a private area to relax
Parking and facilities: essential for those arriving by car
Entertainment options: guests crave amenities like a TV or streaming devices
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living room should be the cover photo, showcasing the expansive views of the Royal Armouries – this will immediately grab the attention of potential guests.
key_diagnosis: Raise occupancy from 15.2% to match the cohort median of 28.3% to capture the £34,056 in lost revenue (76 nights x £230/nt).
Implement key amenities like Outdoor space, Parking and facilities, and Entertainment options to increase booking conversion by 25%.
Add 6-8 high-quality images, covering all rooms and highlighting key features like the stunning city views (current photo count is unknown).
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £230/nt rate is +32% above the cohort median, yet your occupancy languishes at 15.2% – what's the plan to capture the £34,056 in missed revenue?
